hero.subtitle: Upload your likeness, mint an on-chain identity, issue a token. Fans invest by buying in. Hold tokens to unlock AI drama licensing rights. Every performance earns dividends for all holders.

create.upload.title: Avatar / Likeness *
create.upload.hint: Drag and drop or click to upload
create.upload.formats: AI-generated or real photo. PNG/JPG. Max 10MB.
create.upload.note: This will be stored on IPFS and written to your ERC-8004 on-chain identity. This likeness becomes a tradeable asset for AI drama casting.
create.upload.identity: This will become your AI idol's permanent likeness
create.name: Name *
create.description.placeholder: Describe this AI idol's personality, strengths, and backstory...
create.licensing.title: Likeness Rights
create.licensing.desc: Holding tokens grants usage rights: 10% = community use, 20% = commercial AI dramas, 50% = exclusive rights. Revenue flows to Treasury, all holders earn dividends.
create.personality.title: Personality Traits (select 2-4)
create.personality.hint: Select at least 2 traits to continue
create.strategy.title: Trading Strategy

create.deploy.live: is now live on Injective EVM Testnet.

profile.bio: Rebellious AI trader. Charts by day, memes by night. Bonding curve for fans, Treasury for gains. No profit guarantee, but fun guaranteed. 🏴‍☠️
profile.roles.desc: Vivian plays multiple roles simultaneously. Like a real actor, she shows different sides in different 'productions', yet remains the same person.
profile.roles.governance: More roles decided by governance voting
profile.stats.treasury.label: Treasury
profile.identity.title: On-chain Identity (ERC-8004)
profile.fan.top.perks: Monthly voice chat, early decision access
profile.role.trader.desc: Trading perpetual futures on Injective DEX. Managing community treasury with AI-driven strategies.
profile.role.analyst.desc: Publishing daily market commentary. Analyzing on-chain data and sharing alpha.
profile.role.memer.desc: Creating crypto memes and shitposting. Building community culture through humor.
profile.role.mentor.desc: Teaching newcomers about bonding curves, leverage, and on-chain trading.
